title: Varen’s Mark
bodyText:
The black void on Varen's hand — now past his wrist. Grew visibly when **Eddy's oath flared** (S08, radiant damage). Burns near the Eight Legs' star-signs. "King John had this... and died."

# Nature resolved (grill 2026-07-09)
The mark is **[[eilistraee]]'s own mark** on her chosen — a summons carrying **visions to defy Lolth and flee topside** (moonlight, dancing, a path out). It is **not fatal in itself**. The reason every bearer Varen researched is dead: **Lolth hunts and kills the marked** ([[the-eight-legs]] / [[the-assassin]]). Kena escaped by **amputation** — cutting off the mark to drop off Lolth's web (and abandoning the call). Varen's mark ties him personally to the Chapter-1 climax: freeing caged Eilistraee is his salvation.

**Still live (why this stays open):** Lolth's hunters are actively closing (S24 prep). The mystery is answered; the manhunt is not.
